basic_details.job_title: OAV Gunduriguda Hostel Support Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Cook and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Gunduriguda (OAV Gunduriguda) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Hostel Support Staff Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.age_details: Warden: 30-60 years, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: 21-32 years, Head Cook: 30-40 years, Assistant Cook: 21-32 years
age_limit.details: Warden: 30-60 years Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: 21-32 years Head Cook: 30-40 years Assistant Cook: 21-32 years

qualification.education_qualification: BA/BSc with 2 years hostel management experience, HSC
qualification.details: Warden: BA/BSc with at least 02 years of experience in hostel management. Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: HSC (High School Certificate). Head Cook: Please refer to the official notification for specific qualification details. Assistant Cook: Please refer to the official notification for specific qualification details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for details on the selection process.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OAV Gunduriguda Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://malkangiri.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OAV Gunduriguda Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OAV Gunduriguda Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OAV Gunduriguda Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Warden: BA/BSc with at least 02 years of experience in hostel management. Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: HSC (High School Certificate). Head Cook: Please refer to the official notification for specific qualification details. Assistant Cook: Please refer to the official notification for specific qualification details.

content_sections.heading: OAV Gunduriguda Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for details on the selection process.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OAV Gunduriguda Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://malkangiri.odisha.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Gunduriguda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Hostel Support Staff posts is 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Hostel Support Staff?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Hostel Support Staff posts announced by Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Gunduriguda. These vacancies are distributed across various positions like Warden, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper, Head Cook, and Assistant Cook.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for OAV Gunduriguda Recruitment 2026 is offline. Interested candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and send it to the specified address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Warden post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Warden post, candidates must possess a BA or BSc degree and have at least 2 years of experience in hostel management. This ensures that candidates have the necessary skills and knowledge for the role.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for OAV Gunduriguda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post is between 21 to 32 years. Candidates falling within this age bracket are eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Cook position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Cook position is Rs. 6750/- per month. This is a contractual position, and the salary is as per the government norms for such roles.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the organization, which is https://malkangiri.odisha.gov.in. It is recommended to visit this website for all relevant documents.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates along with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual. Therefore, it is not a permanent government job. Candidates should be aware of the contractual nature of the employment before applying.
